subject: Teams shows older messages after reinstall
description: User reinstalled Teams; chat history appears truncated compared to web.

ts_steps.title: Wait for sync
ts_steps.action: Leave Teams open on good network for 30–60 minutes; scroll up to trigger load.

ts_steps.title: Correct tenant
ts_steps.action: Confirm signed into same work account; not personal Teams on same machine.

ts_steps.title: Clear cache
ts_steps.action: Quit Teams; delete Teams cache folders per Microsoft doc; sign in fresh.

internal_information: Chat service vs local cache. Retention policies may legitimately hide old threads. Compare Teams web.
